en.extract:
The Caroline reed warbler or Caroline Islands reed warbler (Acrocephalus syrinx) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found only on the Caroline Islands in Micronesia.

The '''Caroline reed warbler''' or '''Caroline Islands reed warbler''' ('''''Acrocephalus syrinx''''') is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Acrocephalidae]]. It is found only on the [[Caroline Islands]] in [[Micronesia]].<ref>{{Cite journal|last=Tristram|first=H. B.|date=1883|title=On the Position of the Acrocephaline Genus Tatare, with Descriptions of two new Species of the Genus Acrocephalus|url=https://biodiversitylibrary.org/page/16242831|journal=Ibis|language=en|volume=25|issue=1|pages=38–46|doi=10.1111/j.1474-919X.1883.tb03552.x|via=Biodiversity Heritage Library}}</ref>
